snippet.title: The Booyah Awards 2026 - Still on Top or Taken Over? | Free Fire MAX
snippet.description:
Welcome to The Booyah Awards 2026, the biggest celebration of the Free Fire MAX community.

After a year of clutch Booyahs, viral moments, unforgettable streams, and incredible content, it's time to crown the creators, players, and personalities who defined the year. But with new challengers rising every day, the question remains:

рЯФ• Are the legends still on top?

Join us for an evening packed with awards, entertainment, special appearances, and the biggest names in Free Fire MAX.

Who will take home the glory? 

#FreeFireMAX #Booyah

snippet.title: [HINDI] BMPS 2026 | SURVIVAL STAGE | Day 4 #BGMILIVE
snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

It all comes down to this! Day 4 of the Survival Stage in BMPS 2026.

All 32 teams, divided into 4 groups, return with one goal - secure a spot in the Semi Finals.

No second chances, no room for error, every point gained or lost could decide the fate of a team. Only the Top 8 will advance, while the remaining 24 face elimination.
Expect calculated aggression, clutch moments, and teams pushing their limits to stay in the hunt вЪФпЄПрЯФ•

snippet.title: FALL 2: DEADPOINT (2026) Official Trailer - Harriet Slater, Arsema Thomas
snippet.description:
Fall 2: Deadpoint - only in theaters September 2. Starring Harriet Slater, Arsema Thomas, Tom Brittney, Virginia Gardner, and Grace Caroline Currey. Directed by The Spierig Brothers. 

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE: YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.lionsgate.com/movies/
https://www.facebook.com/lionsgate
https://twitter.com/lionsgate
https://www.instagram.com/lionsgate/
https://www.tiktok.com/@lionsgate

#FALLMOVIE

After losing her fearless sister Hunter, a deeply damaged Jax sets out on a dangerous climb with HunterвАЩs old friend to honor her memory. As they tightrope walk the perilous planks of Mount Kwan, a terrifying rockslide leaves them stranded 5,000 feet above ground. In the face of vertigo-inducing sequences, dark truths, and cruel twists, Jax must confront her deepest fears head-on to fight for survival and closure.

Step into the Chola dynasty. Son of Thanjai is an action-adventure game set in ancient South India, featuring the Surul Vaal, a flexible whip sword never before seen in gaming. Play as Vinnendiran, a fallen prince fighting to reclaim a throne through a land torn apart by invasion. Coming to PS5.

snippet.title: Gatta Kusthi 2 - Teaser | Vishnu Vishal, Aishwarya Lekshmi | Chella Ayyavu | Sean Roldan | Vels
snippet.description:
Presenting the teaser of Gatta Kusthi 2, featuring Vishnu Vishal and Aishwarya Lekshmi in the lead roles. The film is set to hit the big screens on July 3rd, 2026. 

Produced by Vels Film International, Vishnu Vishal Studioz. 

Starring - Vishnu Vishal, Aishwarya Lekshmi, Ramya Krishnan, Yogi Babu, Karunaas, Muniskanth, Kaali Venkat, Karunakaran, Zara, Mokksha and others. 

Written and Directed by - Chella Ayyavu

Producers : Dr Ishari K Ganesh & Vishnu Vishal 
Co- Producers : Shubhra, Aryan Ramesh & Ishan Saksena
Music : Sean Roldan 
DOP : KM Bhaskaran 
Editor : Barath Vikraman
Art Director : Jayachandran
Costume designer : Ruchi Munoth
Subtitles - Sajid Ali 
Publicity Designer : Viyaki
Marketing and Promotions : Siddarth Srinivas
Executive Producer : Seetharam
Creative Producer : Shravanthi Sainath

Music Credits
Music Composed and Arranged by Sean Roldan
Music Produced by Rajesh
Additional Music Production : Rajkumar Chandrasekaran
Vocals : Sean Roldan, Rajkumar Chandrasekaran
Electric Guitar : Abinandan R David
Mixed and Mastered by Aswin George John at Magic Fader Studio
Roldan Records Sound Engineer : Sabari Bharathi Krishna
Music Management: Vishwa R, Silver Tree Talent Management

Music Label - Sony Music India Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Shararat - Audio | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Shashwat S, Jasmine, Madhubanti, Ayesha, Krystle
snippet.description:
Shararat - this oneвАЩs made for the dance floor.

рЯСЙ Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Song Name: Shararat
Music: Shashwat Sachdev
Singers: Madhubanti Bagchi, Jasmine Sandlas
Lyrics: Jasmine Sandlas, Shashwat Sachdev

Lyrics:
Tune parda uthaaya, haaye kya baat ho gayi 
Haaye 
Ye mulakaat, vaardaat ho gayi 
Nain milaaye humne ik dooje se yoon 
Raat hui 
Phir din 
Phir se raat ho gayi 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Ik afeemi main chaskha chakhaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Aye Haye Tum bhi ho tanha 
Aur hum akele Jo saath huye laajawab ho gaye 
Tum bhi haseen aur hum aashqeen 
Jo raat huyi benaqaab ho gaye 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Gulabi ye sharbat pilaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik rangeela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan

Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Miljaye Khuda Mujhko Toh Main Lelu Balaaye

Ehsaas Na Hoga, Ehsaas Na Hoga

snippet.title: Hamari Yadein Hongi вАУ Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Hamari Yadein Hongi вАУ Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Aaj hum hainвА¶
kal hamari yaadein hongi.

Jab hum na hongeвА¶
tab shayad
hamari baatein hongi.

Kabhi palat kar
zindagi ke panne dekhnaвА¶
shayad tab
tumhari aankhon me bhi barsaatein hongi.

вАЬHamari Yadein HongiвАЭ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo mohabbat me
khud ko mita kar bhi
sirf yaadein bankar reh gaya.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai вАФ

hum chale jayengeвА¶
par hamari yaadein hamesha rahengiвА¶

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

Hamari Yadein Hongi вАУ Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Aaj hum hainвА¶
kal hamari yaadein hongi.

Jab hum na hongeвА¶
tab shayad
hamari baatein hongi.

Kabhi palat kar
zindagi ke panne dekhnaвА¶
shayad tab
tumhari aankhon me bhi barsaatein hongi.

вАЬHamari Yadein HongiвАЭ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo mohabbat me
khud ko mita kar bhi
sirf yaadein bankar reh gaya.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai вАФ

hum chale jayengeвА¶
par hamari yaadein hamesha rahengiвА¶

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

Relive the emotional magic of "Tujhko Na Dekhun To Ji Ghabarata Hai" from the blockbuster movie Jaanwar (1999). snippet.title: [EN] 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event | Grand Finals | Day 1 | PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1
snippet.description:
The 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 Main Event reaches its peak with the Grand Finals. 1,000,000+ players across the globe wanted to be on this stage. Only a handful of them have shown they are more skillful than the rest. 16 teams, two days, one champion. Every squad on that roster has earned their seat the hard way. No soft paths, no charity. Just the best of the best fighting for the right to call themselves champions.

рЯПЖ 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

рЯУЛ FORMAT

Group Stage :
вАҐ 32 teams split into 2 groups of 16
вАҐ 2 days total (1 day per group)
вАҐ Overall Ranking 1вАУ6 вЖТ Grand Finals
вАҐ Overall Ranking 7вАУ14 вЖТ Survival Stage
вАҐ Overall Ranking 15вАУ16 вЖТ Eliminated

Survival Stage : 
вАҐ Overall Ranking 1вАУ4 вЖТ Grand Finals
вАҐ Overall Ranking 5вАУ16 вЖТ Eliminated

Grand Finals (SMASH Rule)
вАҐ 16 teams вАФ 2 days, 6 matches per day

рЯФ• SMASH RULE ( On Day 2) 
SMASH Rule is the most exciting way to claim the trophy but how do you do it? Here is how : 

Day 1 Overall Ranking #1 team's points +10 = Match Point Threshold.
Hit the threshold on Day 2, then win another match to claim the title.
No SMASH? Highest total points wins under standard overall ranking.

рЯЧУ Tournament Schedule: 

Group Stage: June 2вАУ3
Survival Stage: June 4
Grand Finals: June 6вАУ7

Try PUBG MOBILE now:  https://pubgmobile.go.link/26pmgo

en.description:
The 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 Main Event reaches its peak with the Grand Finals. 1,000,000+ players across the globe wanted to be on this stage. Only a handful of them have shown they are more skillful than the rest. 16 teams, two days, one champion. Every squad on that roster has earned their seat the hard way. No soft paths, no charity. Just the best of the best fighting for the right to call themselves champions.

рЯПЖ 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

Survival Stage : 
вАҐ Overall Ranking 1вАУ4 вЖТ Grand Finals
вАҐ Overall Ranking 5вАУ16 вЖТ Eliminated

Grand Finals (SMASH Rule)
вАҐ 16 teams вАФ 2 days, 6 matches per day

рЯФ• SMASH RULE ( On Day 2) 
SMASH Rule is the most exciting way to claim the trophy but how do you do it? Here is how : 

Day 1 Overall Ranking #1 team's points +10 = Match Point Threshold.
Hit the threshold on Day 2, then win another match to claim the title.
No SMASH? Highest total points wins under standard overall ranking.

Chant the sacred Govinda Namalu in Telugu and experience the divine blessings of Lord Venkateswara Swamy (Balaji). These powerful chants glorify Lord Govinda, the protector and savior of devotees, and are widely recited with deep faith and devotion.

Listening to Govinda Namalu fills your heart with peace, devotion, and spiritual strength. It is especially powerful on Saturdays, bringing divine grace, removing obstacles, and attracting prosperity and happiness.

snippet.title: Attraah Baras Ki Tu Hone Ko | Suhaag (1979) | Amitabh Bachchan, Rekha | Mohd.Rafi, Lata Mangeshkar
snippet.description:
рЯОµ Attraah Baras Ki Tu Hone Ko рЯОµ

Enjoy the evergreen Bollywood classic "Attraah Baras Ki Tu Hone Ko" from the blockbuster film Suhaag (1979). Featuring the iconic on-screen chemistry of Amitabh Bachchan and Rekha, this memorable song is beautifully rendered by legendary singers Mohammed Rafi and Lata Mangeshkar. 

Attraah Baras Ki Tu Hone Ko | Suhaag (1979) | Amitabh Bachchan, Rekha | Mohd.Rafi, Lata Mangeshkar 

Song: Attraah Baras Ki Tu Hone Ko
Movie: Suhaag (1979)
Starcast: Amitabh Bachchan, Rekha
Singer: Mohd.Rafi, Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 

Lyrics:
athara baras ki tu hone ko aayi re
athara baras ki tu hone ko aayi re
kon puchhega jatan kuch kar le
sajan kar le jatan kuch kar le
khali bato se teri bat na banegi raja
khali bato se teri bat na banegi raja
humse na hoga milan kuch kar le
kuch kar le jatan kuch kar le

mere ghungharu salamat hazaro qadardan hai
mere ghungharu salamat hazaro qadardan hai
ek tu hi nahi dil me dil me lakho mehaman hai
lakho mehaman hai
lekin kab tak nachegi kabhi to thakega
jatan kuch kar le, kuch kar le jatan kuch kar le

kar le humse mohabbat mohabbat mohabbat
kar le humse mohabbat guzar na jaye ghadiya
haye tutati hai payal to banti hai hathkadiya
haye tutati hai payal to banti hai hathkadiya
mai hathkadiya phanungi
mai hathkadiya phanungi
na phanungi tere kangan kuch kar le
kuch kar le jatan kuchh kar le

athara baras ki tu hone ko aayi re
athara baras ki tu hone ko aayi re
kon puchhega jatan kuch kar le
humse na hoga milan kuch kar le
kuch kar le jatan kuch kar le

It is also the story of 3 young men and women who have to learn to follow their hearts against all the odds and the outcome of their love stories that will decide what will finally triumph love or fear.

snippet.title: Kasam Khake Kaho - Lyrical | Preity Zinta | Arjun Rampal | Mahima | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik & Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist : Sameer

Lyrics :

Hey Hey Hey Aa Ha Ha...
Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho, Dil Lagake Kaho Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai 
 
Sharmake Kaho Balkhake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai
 
Ek Ajab See Dil Me Hasrat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Chahe Tumko Dil Me Chahat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Hame Pyar Karo, Ikrar Karo, Sanso Me Basake Rakh Lo
Tum Sham-O-Saher Didar Karo, Khwabo Me Chhupake Rakh Lo
 
Najar Jhukake Kaho, Palak Uthake Kaho
Ha Kaho Naa Kaho, Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Ek Bechainee See Hotee Hai, Abb Toh Tere Nam Se
Ishk Huwa Jab Se Naa Gujra Ek Lamha Aaram Se
Kya Hal Huwa Chahat Me Sanam, Mushkil Hai Tumse Kuchh Kehna
Hai Tumko Kasam Mehbub Kabhee, Aankho Se Dur Naa Rehna
Itrake Kaho, Jhilmilake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho
Han Kaho Naa Kaho, Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

#KasamKhakeKaho #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #KumarSanu #MahimaChaudhary
